column1: How do I book an appointment with a doctor?
column2: You can book an appointment online through our website or by calling our reception at 1800-XXX-XXXX.

column4: and your insurance card if applicable.

column1: What are the hospital visiting hours?
column2: Visiting hours are from 9am to 12pm and 4pm to 7pm on all days including weekends.

column1: How do I cancel or reschedule my appointment?
column2: You can cancel or reschedule your appointment by calling reception at least 24 hours in advance.

column2: Yes
column3: we have a fully stocked pharmacy on the ground floor open from 8am to 10pm daily.

column1: How do I get a referral to a specialist?

column3: we encourage second opinions. Please contact our patient services team to arrange this.

column1: What is the cost of a general consultation?
column2: A general consultation costs between 300 to 500 rupees depending on the doctor and department.

column5: or online through our patient portal.

column1: What is the difference between a GP and a specialist?
column2: A GP is a general physician who treats common illnesses while a specialist focuses on a specific area like cardiology or neurology.

column1: How many calories should I eat per day?
